title: Plan Display RLE
description:
Any repeated actions like PlaceBlock should RLE compress and show the repeat count if more than one
```
01:52:20] [plan] Build:small-house: 232 actions [SearchMemory → Wander → MineBlock → SearchMemory → Wander → MineBlock→ SearchMemory → MineBlock → CraftItem → CraftItem → CraftItem → CraftItem → CraftItem → CraftItem → CraftItem → SearchMemory → MoveTo → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → PlaceBlock → (...continues...)   → PlaceBlock → GetStatus]
```
